name: Subcompact MG
description: The Subcompact MG is a fast-firing Tediore SMG with low recoil and a comfortable magazine, making it easy to hold on target and dump quickly. Its thrown reload is relatively weak, so the gun leans more on direct fire than on Tediore gimmick damage. Barrel parts still shift the feel noticeably, with Tediore versions favoring speed and handling, Bandit or Scav versions pushing damage, and Maliwan versions improving accuracy and elemental output.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
